prerequisites.value: Dolphin Style, Improved Unarmed Strike, Swim 6 ranks, base attack bonus +6 or monk level 6th.

description.value: **Benefit:** While in Dolphin Style, as a standard action underwater you can move up to half your swim speed, make a single melee attack against a creature within your reach, and then retreat back to your previous position. Your movement and attack donât provoke attacks of opportunity, even if your foe has an ability that allows attacks of opportunity with triggers other than moving out of a threatened area.
